hooks.command: LAST_COMMIT=$(git log -1 --format="%ct" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); STATUS_T=$(git log -1 --format="%ct" -- tasks-completed/STATUS.md 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$STATUS_T" ] && STATUS_T=$(stat -c %Y tasks-completed/STATUS.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ -n "$LAST_COMMIT" ] && [ "$LAST_COMMIT" -gt "$STATUS_T" ]; then echo "tasks-completed/STATUS.md is stale — commits exist that are newer than the last STATUS.md update. Please update it to reflect the work just done, then commit it."; exit 2; fi
